task: Advanced high-value task: Ontology Mapping Candidate Measurement Drift Workup. Scenario: a production incident review board wants to convert raw records into a repeatable decision process for ontology mapping candidate. Embedded packet (use only these records; do not invent or impute values): R1 confidence_pct=80 type_compatible=119 cardinality_risk=1; R2 confidence_pct=89 type_compatible=115 cardinality_risk=4; R3 confidence_pct=75 type_compatible=130 cardinality_risk=0. Remediation options (each option applies only as specified): O1 changes confidence_pct by -12% cost=96500; O2 changes type_compatible by -18% cost=109300; O3 changes cardinality_risk by -25% cost=66700; max_budget=135600. Decision rules: accept if confidence_pct >= 85 AND type_compatible (interpreted as meeting type_compatible threshold); confidence 65-84 requires curator review; missing values cannot be imputed; all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: produce a concise gate decision that includes calculations, caveats, residual risk, machine-readable exception labels, and a final recommendation table. Deliverables: ontology_mapping_2.xlsx (with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, sensitivity checks) and expert_memo.md (concise gate decision, explicit assumptions, sensitivity analysis, final recommendation). Mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
